review: UX-REVIEW-8 (verification of the UX-REVIEW-7 fix round + live-use rounds)
device: Tulip CC, COM11, 1024x600, new firmware with tulip.amy_level()
verdict: approved; fix loop converged; remaining items are one styling/copy pass + one listen test

NEW-1.note: 4x keyboard open/close + full pass: zero WDT, alloc noise gone. PSRAM-only PARTIAL buffer, off-tick restyle/resize, 40-row windowed list. Internal RAM is designed-full (24B free idle) -- documented constraint now.

NEW-2_M3.note: True root cause: add_state(CHECKED) started the theme style-transition animation toward theme blue before custom styles applied. Styles-then-state + deferred panel invalidate guard. Verified green on refill path.

NEW-3.note: Magenta/crimson gone but disabled sliders render olive tracks + BLACK knobs on-device, not SURFACE2/MUTED. See R-1.

NEW-5.note: header collapses; 2-3 rows visible while typing

PROC-1.note: device found in user's own live state; config byte-identical at restore

new_surfaces_verified.name: Disjoint rack-row tap targets
new_surfaces_verified.verdict: excellent; near-miss on switch toggles instead of navigating

new_surfaces_verified.name: Real audio chip meter (amy_level C tap)
new_surfaces_verified.verdict: verified live end-to-end via tulip.midi_local chord; meter lit green

new_surfaces_verified.name: Two-column no-scroll Settings + wifi masking + 24h toggle
Localized 12h clock
new_surfaces_verified.verdict: working (real local time in top bar)

new_surfaces_verified.name: Soft keyboard real typing (kb.set_textarea)
new_surfaces_verified.verdict: wiring verified (kb.get_textarea()==search ta); REPL cannot synthesize btnmatrix presses -- human live test is the final word

findings.title: Disabled controls render olive tracks + black knobs (NEW-3 residual)
findings.summary: Intended SURFACE2/MUTED disabled look does not land on the panel; some recolor path still mixes through RGB332. Verify the fix against a device screenshot, not source.
findings.suggested_fix: Set explicit DISABLED part colors AND zero any recolor/opa mixing (style_set_recolor_opa 0, image/knob color explicit); confirm on-device.

findings.title: Possible first-note drop after boot ('No synth configured for MIDI channel 1' logged once)
findings.summary: First note through the C MIDI layer logged the warning; subsequent notes played (amy_level > 0). If the first note is silent, the first key after power-on is dead. Needs a listen test.

location.file: C MIDI layer synth map priming (d2feb229) / deckcfg.apply_all

findings.suggested_fix: Prime the C synth map at boot/apply_all instead of lazily on first note; or confirm the warning is log-only and the note sounds.

findings.title: Update-failed overlay keeps the 'don't play or touch the deck' caution above 'tap to dismiss'
Editor right-column cards flush to the right screen edge; left column keeps a margin
findings.suggested_fix: Match right gutter to left (or reserve the 18px scrollbar gutter symmetrically).

findings.title: Update overlay shows raw byte counts (380000/1000000)

method_note: Simulated-tap coverage is not input-path coverage: the keyboard-never-typed bug was only catchable by a human (harness verified search via set_text, bypassing key events; the lv binding exposes no btnmatrix press synthesis). Keep alternating agent passes with human live rounds.
